schema.description: Peer registration payload. The `declaration_sig` must be a valid Ed25519 signature over the canonical declaration JSON, verifiable against the peer's public key from its `/.well-known/stigmem` endpoint. See spec §6.1.

node_id.description: Stable URI for the registering node.

node_url.description: Base HTTP URL of the registering node.

items.description: Visibility scope for a fact. `local` and `team` scopes are never federated (except with `STIGMEM_FEDERATION_ALLOW_TEAM=true`). See spec §2.2.
items.title: FactScope

declaration_sig.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the declaration preimage. See spec §6.1.

schema.title: PeerRegisterRequest
